nasb.text: But to the married I give instructions, not I, but the Lord, that the wife should not leave her husband

esv.text: To the married I give this charge (not I, but the Lord): the wife should not separate from her husband

cnv.text: 我要吩咐已婚的人，妻子不可離開丈夫。

ccb.text: 我也吩咐那些已婚的人，其实不是我吩咐，而是主吩咐：妻子不可离开丈夫，

csbs.text: 至于对那些已经结婚的人，我吩咐——其实不是我，而是主吩咐：妻子不可离开丈夫；
